SEARCH
Package com.nib.supernaut.backbone

Interface IBackbone

All Known Implementing Classes:
EmbeddedBackbone
public interface IBackbone
IBackbone interface provides a set of methods for managing various resources.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    cleanUp()
    Cleans up resources.
    void
    close()
     
    IBackboneScheduler
    createScheduler(String name, int n)
    Creates a scheduler with the given name and number of threads.

    getActiveNodes()
    Returns a list of active nodes.
    IBackboneAtomicLong
    getAtomicLong(String path, String name)
    Returns an atomic long for a given path and name.

    getBackboneKey(String path, String name)
    Returns the backbone key for a given path and name.

    Returns a binary stream for a given path and name.

    Returns a bucket for a given path and name.
